text: You have just extinguished an oil fire on the floor plates of the engine room with a 15-pound CO2 extinguisher. Which of the listed dangers should you now be preparing to handle?

options.text: Complete systemic failure of main engine gear oil feeds
Toxic gas ignition inside air trunk lines
Frostbite cracks inside fuel line connection joints

explanation: CO2 extinguishes fire by displacing oxygen but does not cool the fuel significantly. Therefore, any remaining hot spots or fuel near the ignition temperature can easily re-flash once the CO2 dissipates and oxygen returns.
